title: Driveways - Elite South Texas
content:
Our driveway coatings offer durable surfaces in virtually endless designs, textures and colors. These coatings are applied to existing concrete surfaces and can be installed with minimal downtime. Our products can be used to repair and restore surface deterioration as a cost-effective alternative to tear-out and repour of the concrete substrate. They are chemical and stain resistant, as well as resistant to de-icing salts and chemicals and can withstand extreme hot and cold temperatures.
Advantages
Durable, long lasting
Easy to clean and maintain
Abrasion and chemical resistant
For new or existing concrete
Options for surface repair and restoration without tear out
Quick install options for minimal downtime
Resistant to damage from water, de-icing salts and freeze/thaw conditions
UV resistant
Slip resistant in wet or dry conditions for pedestrian and vehicular safety
Wide selection of colors, patterns, textures and design options
Options to reduce surface temperature in warmer climates
Polymer Modified Cement
SYPP™
